title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: glib2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for glib2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: GLib provides the core application building blocks for libraries and applications written in C. It provides the core object system used in GNOME, the main loop implementation, and a large set of utility functions for strings and common data structures.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): GDBusConnection does not handle serial number overflow (breaking gnome-terminal and NetworkManager) [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114058)

full_text:
An update for glib2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

GLib provides the core application building blocks for libraries and applications written in C. It provides the core object system used in GNOME, the main loop implementation, and a large set of utility functions for strings and common data structures.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): GDBusConnection does not handle serial number overflow (breaking gnome-terminal and NetworkManager) [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114058)
